svg.text: McCzarny recently enhanced the ghsummary
repository by adding basic Markdown formatting
support for bold, italic, and inline code to
the generated SVGs. He also introduced a
timestamp override feature for the SVG output.
In the chromium-daily-digest repository, he
updated the favicon and logo to dynamically
indicate new versions and added new daily
summaries, while also fixing a regular
expression for digest version extraction. He
dedicated significant effort to the
flexible-log-analyzer project, implementing a
new GitHub Actions workflow to publish the
extension to the Open VSX Registry. This
involved addressing CodeQL workflow permissions
and refining the publishing process by removing
the develop branch as a trigger. He also
updated various dependencies and lowered the
minimum compatible VS Code version for the
flexible-log-analyzer. A minor package version
increment from 0.3.10 to 0.3.11 was also
committed. Lastly, he made a specific update to
the crater-js game, adding a feature to
randomize the starting position.
Generated on: Sun Jul 12 03:23:32 2026
